Your $28M Series B in January and 9 open ML engineering roles caught my attention — that pace of build-out is where we work best.

We've helped Series B ML teams in similar positions scope engineering capacity without over-extending. Happy to show you how on a 15-minute call.

Would Thursday at 2pm PT work?

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
